title: catabrosa distans
intro: Catabrosa distans, also known as Wood-sedge or Wood sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Catabrosa distans include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. Catabrosa distans can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
